descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos defeat Richmond Sockeyes 6-1 in Centennial Cup round-robin play.
descriptionLong: In Centennial Cup junior-A championship action at Humboldt, Saskatchewan on May 7, 1987, the host Humboldt Broncos defeated the B.C.-champion Richmond Sockeyes 6-1. Humboldt improved to 3-0 in round-robin play with goals from Bill McDougall and Garnett Kazuik (two each), Duncan Ryhorchuk, and Curtis Chamberlin. Stan Czenczek scored for Richmond, whose 2-1 record qualified them for the semifinal against Pembroke.

attribution.headline: Humboldt defeats Richmond in Centennial Cup round-robin
